description: User selects the 'I'm an employee' option on the income source screen
frame_description: The user is presented with options for how they earn their income and selects the first option.

description: The page transitions from the income source question to the first name input screen
frame_description: The UI updates to show a new question: 'One last thing, what's your first name?'

description: User pauses on the name input screen, likely reading the prompt
interaction_target: Type your first name here input field
frame_description: The screen shows a text input field for the user's first name and a 'GET MY HOME LOAN MATCHES' button.

description: User clicks on the 'Type your first name here' input field to begin entering their name
interaction_target: Type your first name here input field
frame_description: The input field gains focus, indicated by a blue border, and the mobile keyboard begins to appear.

description: The mobile keyboard appears on screen
frame_description: The iOS keyboard slides up from the bottom of the screen.

description: User pauses with the keyboard open before starting to type
frame_description: The keyboard is fully visible, but no characters have been entered into the text field yet.
